{{CargoRelic
|name=Chan-hee's Tea Recipe
|class_id=20836
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=Due to the lack of a business license, Chan-hee's tea workshop, where floral tea was being illegally produced and sold, has been legally seized. Only her secret recipe remains as a warning to future generations: improper tea production leads to tears of regret...
|fame=16
|art=15
|fth=13
|civ=14
|tech=31
|ss1=Snail HP +100<br>Per 5 Wonder Fungi eaten, Snail RUSH +1<br>Wonder Fungi used: 200/200
|ss2=Snail HP +200<br>Per 5 Wonder Fungi eaten, Snail RUSH +2<br>Wonder Fungi used: 200/200
|ss3=Snail HP +300<br>Per 5 Wonder Fungi eaten, Snail RUSH +3<br>Wonder Fungi used: 200/200
|ss4=Snail HP +300<br>Per 5 Wonder Fungi eaten, Snail RUSH +3<br>Wonder Fungi used: 200/200
|ss7=Snail HP +300<br>Per 5 Wonder Fungi eaten, Snail RUSH +3<br>Wonder Fungi used: 200/200<br> (Awakened)
}}
